question: CO opens 2.5 bb. BTN 3-bets small. You are CO with KJo OOP. Call or fold?
rationale: OOP without initiative with a marginal offsuit broadway performs poorly.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 001.
reaction_text: Smart tempo. Keep pressing on fold.

question: UTG opens 2.2 bb. BB defends. Flop A72r. UTG cbets 33%. You are BB with 77. Call or fold?
rationale: Second pair with good showdown value vs small c-bet should continue.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 002.
reaction_text: Nice composure. Keep pressing on call.

question: UTG opens 2.2 bb. BB defends. Flop K92r. UTG cbets 33%. You are BB with Q9s. Call or fold?
rationale: Middle pair plus backdoor equity continues vs small size.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 003.
reaction_text: Steady read. Keep pressing on call.

question: BTN opens 2.2 bb. BB calls. Flop 986ss. BTN cbets 33%. You are BB with A6o no spade. Call or fold?
rationale: Weak pair with no backdoors vs dynamic board often folds.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 004.
reaction_text: Great flow. Keep pressing on fold.

question: CO opens 2.5 bb. BB calls. Flop T72r. CO cbets 33%. You are BB with A5s backdoor flush. Call or fold?
rationale: Two overs plus backdoor equity vs small size is a call.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 005.
reaction_text: Smooth control. Keep pressing on call.

question: BTN opens 2.2 bb. SB 3-bets to 8 bb. You are BTN with A4s IP. Call or fold?
rationale: IP with suited Ace has playability vs SB 3-bet.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 006.
reaction_text: Smart tempo. Keep pressing on call.

question: MP opens 2.3 bb. BTN 3-bets small. You are MP with AJo OOP. Call or fold?
rationale: AJo offsuit performs poorly OOP vs a 3-bet without initiative.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 007.
reaction_text: Nice composure. Keep pressing on fold.

question: CO opens 2.5 bb. BB calls. Flop 752r. CO checks back. Turn K. BB checks. You are CO with AQo. BB bets 75% river on 752K2. Call or fold?
rationale: Runout favors BB range; no pair, no blockers; you lack initiative and strong showdown.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 008.
reaction_text: Steady read. Keep pressing on fold.

question: CO opens 2.5 bb. BB calls. Flop A82r. CO cbets 33%. You are BB with A3s. Call or fold?
rationale: Top pair weak kicker is a standard defend vs small c-bet.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 009.
reaction_text: Great flow. Keep pressing on call.

question: BTN opens 2.2 bb. BB calls. Flop QJ4r. BTN cbets 33%. You are BB with KTo backdoor straight. Call or fold?
rationale: Two overs plus backdoor straight is a call vs small size.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 010.
reaction_text: Smart tempo. Keep pressing on call.

question: UTG opens 2.3 bb. CO 3-bets. You are UTG with 66 OOP 100 bb deep. Call or fold?
rationale: Set mine OOP vs strong range is marginal without implied odds and you lack initiative.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 011.
reaction_text: Nice composure. Keep pressing on fold.

question: SB completes. BB checks. Flop K72r. SB bets 50%. You are BB with K5o. Call or fold?
rationale: Top pair vs single bet in position is a call; you also have position.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 012.
reaction_text: Steady read. Keep pressing on call.

question: CO opens 2.5 bb. BTN calls. BB squeezes big. You are CO with AQs OOP. BTN folds. Call or fold?
rationale: Strong suited broadway can continue even OOP vs squeeze due to equity and blockers.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 013.
reaction_text: Great flow. Keep pressing on call.

question: BTN opens 2.2 bb. BB calls. Flop 953r. BTN cbets 33%. You are BB with 86s gutshot backdoor flush. Call or fold?
rationale: Gutshot plus backdoor equity continues vs small c-bet.
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Positions And Initiative Drill 014.
reaction_text: Smooth control. Keep pressing on call.
